title: Reusable Components
heading: Reusable Components
description: Build components once and share them across multiple page objects.
body: Most enterprise apps reuse UI blocks like tables, sidebars, list filters, and modals. In traditional automation, locator logic for these blocks gets repeated on every page.

reusability.title: Defining once, reusing everywhere
reusability.description: With this pattern, standard elements like grid actions, sorting, and header inspections are unified. Whether it's a users table, an orders table, or a products table, they use the exact same base class and actions.
